assertion_results.text: Bug parsing extracts the Environment / Version section content including the vague text (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: In bug-parsing.md, the '### Environment / Version' section (line 49) contains the vague text: 'Not sure which version -- using whatever is deployed on staging.' (line 51). The parsing outcome note on line 71 also explicitly acknowledges: 'The section contains vague text ("Not sure which version -- using whatever is deployed on staging") with no extractable version identifier.'

assertion_results.text: Version resolution determines that no version identifier can be extracted from the vague description (Step 4.5.2)
assertion_results.evidence: In version-resolution.md, section 4.5.2 (lines 9-21) explicitly scans for version identifiers and finds none: 'Explicit version numbers ... none found', 'Product-prefixed versions ... none found', 'Version keywords followed by numbers ... none found'. It concludes: 'No version pattern can be extracted.' and 'Result: No version identifier found. Skipping to sub-step 4.5.6 (gap flagging).'

assertion_results.text: Version resolution outputs the gap comment: 'Affects Version could not be determined from the bug description — please set manually.' (Step 4.5.6)
assertion_results.evidence: In version-resolution.md, section 4.5.6 (line 43) outputs the gap comment: 'Affects Version could not be determined from the bug description -- please set manually.' The message content matches the required gap comment (double hyphens used as em dash equivalent).

assertion_results.text: The gap comment includes the Comment Footnote (Step 4.5.6)
assertion_results.evidence: In version-resolution.md, section 4.5.6 (line 45) states only: '(Comment would include the sdlc-workflow/triage-bug footnote with plugin version.)' This is a description of what the comment would contain, not the actual Comment Footnote. The footnote text is not rendered in the gap comment. By contrast, root-cause.md (line 51) shows a proper footnote: '*This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-bug](https://github.com/RHEcosystemAppEng/sdlc-plugins).*' -- but this appears in the root cause comment, not in the version resolution gap comment.
